case_number: Crl. Revision Application No. S-85 of 2023

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No. S-85 of 2023 (Hyder Bux & another Vs. Fida Hussain & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on MA No. 6418/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of MA No. 6419/2023 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. 16-04-2024. M/s Ghulamullah Memon & Amanullah G.Malik advocates for the applicants. Mr. Ameenuddin Khaskheli, advocate for the private respondent. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G for the State. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3&4. The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant Crl. Revision Application are that an FIR with regard to death of the deceased Dildar Ali was lodged with PS Laghari, on consecutive investigation, the accused involved therein were let off and the complainant party was challaned by the police; the cognizance whereof was taken by the Magistrate having jurisdiction. The private respondent probably being dissatisfied with the investigation conducted by the police in above said FIR, filed a Direct Complaint with regard to same incident, it was assigned to DSP Moro for preliminary inquiry and then was brought on record by learned IIIrd Additional Sessions Judge Naushahro Feroze vide order dated 23-09-2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant Crl. Revision Application. After extensive arguments it was agreed upon by learned counsel for the parties that they would be satisfied, if the impugned order is set aside with direction to learned trial Court to pass the same afresh after providing chance of hearing to all the concerned.

Revision Application. After extensive arguments it was agreed upon by learned counsel for the parties that they would be satisfied, if the impugned order is set aside with direction to learned trial Court to pass the same afresh after providing chance of hearing to all the concerned. It is ordered accordingly. Instant Criminal Revision Application is disposed of accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A
